title: Better With Patches
description: Reckless attempt at making Better With Mods for 1.7 playable
body:
Have you ever wondered what Better With Mods would be like if it was slightly more functional on 1.7.10? You may not have to wonder much longer.
Better With Patches is a collection of various tweaks, improvements and workarounds for the last known Beta versions of Better With Mods.

Here's a complete list of features:
-A mix of small fixes and tweaks to various parts of the mod for the sake of preventing crashes, correcting implementation and potentially improving performance;
-Improvements (and outright replacement in cases) for the recipe internals, such as removing hardcoded behaviours and adding more ways to define recipes;
-Recipe views for NotEnoughItems, made to resemble Better With Mods' own displays from 1.9+;
-MineTweaker integration for most of the mod's features, largely resembling Better With Mods' own compat with slight differences;
-Backported Hardcore Features from the more recent versions of Better With Mods;

As of version 0.6.8, the appropriate version of Better With Mods will be automatically downloaded on startup and does not need to be downloaded manually (unless you're having connectivity issues). 

This mod REQUIRES either Unimixins (Minimal modular install should be Unimix + GTNH Mixins module + SpongeMixins module) or GTNH Mixins! 
For a more detailed list of changes, see the source code. Most of the patches are accompanied by JavaDoc comments, which provide (brief) reasonings for whichever changes may have been made.
